message:
fix(wasm): update wasmtime component bindings for wasmtime 41.x API

- extensions.rs: update wasmtime::component::bindgen! macro to use
  new async import/export syntax (imports: { default: async },
  exports: { default: async }) replacing the flat 'async: true' that
  was removed in wasmtime 41
- extensions.rs: update host::add_to_linker call to include explicit
  HasSelf<HostState> type parameter required by wasmtime 41's
  component model linker API
- pi_wasm.rs: add Extern::Tag(_) => "tag" arm to exhaustive match
  over wasmtime::Extern variants — Tag was added in wasmtime 41
  for exception handling proposal support

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
